keys.description: Per-tenant program catalogue (list of programs filtered by status='active'). Read by /me/referral-code + SDUI list screens.
Single program row + config JSONBs. Read hot on every referral claim / trigger / vesting evaluation.
Code -> {program_id, code_id, is_active, expires_at, usage_cap, usage_count} lookup. Read hot on the claim path.
User's active user_scoped codes per active program. Read by /me/referral-code + invitation composer.
User's own referral history (as referrer). Read by /me/referrals + the my-referrals SDUI screen. Short TTL because claim + signup events invalidate.
User's own rewards (as recipient). Read by /me/referral-rewards.
User's current referral count per program (against max_rewards_per_referrer + max_rewards_per_period). Read on every claim to short-circuit refund path.
invalidatedBy: ReferralVested (where referrer_id = user_id AND referral_program_id = program_id)

keys.description: Running rewards_issued_count + rewards_issued_amount_cents per program. Cached snapshot of the counter columns; invalidated on any reward transition.
Program-level analytics rollup: claims count, signups count, vested count, rewarded count, clawback count, revenue attribution, per (day/week/month) window. Powers the program-detail dashboards.
Count of unreviewed fraud flags per tenant. Powers the admin dashboard's fraud-attention badge.
Global-scope Set of disposable-email domains loaded from data/disposable-email-domains.json. 24h TTL (rarely changes; loaded at boot).
Per-tenant per-email-hash suppression list (unsubscribed recipients). Read on every POST /me/invitations to silently drop suppressed recipients.
